# Diff Feedback

Use this file to add review comments on code changes. The `/address-feedback` command will read this file and present your feedback to the agent.

## Metadata
<!-- AUTO-GENERATED - DO NOT EDIT -->
version: 2
last_synced: # Auto-populated by Review Panel
file_hashes: # Files listed as: path/to/file.ts: hash123
<!-- END METADATA -->

## Format

Use markdown headers to reference specific locations:

- `### path/to/file.ts:42` - Comment on specific line
- `### path/to/file.ts:15-20` - Comment on line range
- `### path/to/file.ts` - General comment about file
- `### General` - Overall task feedback

Each comment should have metadata (auto-generated by the Review Panel):
```
<!-- id: abc123 | status: open | created: 2025-12-30T10:00:00Z -->
```

Mark resolved items with ~~strikethrough~~ and update status to `resolved`.

---

<!-- Add your feedback below this line -->
